title: Refactor: Migrate API to GraphQL
original_text: Refactored REST API to GraphQL. Implemented GraphQL schema with types and resolvers. Added GraphQL playground for testing. Implemented query batching and caching. Added GraphQL subscriptions for real-time updates. Result: GraphQL API deployed.
expected_subject: refactor(api): migrate REST API to GraphQL
expected_body_lines: - Implement GraphQL schema with types and resolvers
- Add GraphQL subscriptions for real-time updates
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(api): migrate REST API to GraphQL"
